core.label: PL/SQL Fundamentals
core.description: Blocks, variables, control flow, and SQL integration.

topics.label: Anonymous Blocks
topics.description: DECLARE/BEGIN/EXCEPTION/END structure. PL/SQL extends SQL with procedural logic.

topics.label: Variables & Data Types
topics.description: NUMBER, VARCHAR2, DATE, BOOLEAN, %TYPE, %ROWTYPE. Anchor types to table columns.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: IF/ELSIF/ELSE, CASE, FOR LOOP, WHILE LOOP, LOOP/EXIT WHEN.

topics.label: Cursors
topics.description: Implicit and explicit cursors for row-by-row processing. CURSOR FOR LOOP pattern.

topics.label: Stored Procedures & Functions
topics.description: CREATE PROCEDURE/FUNCTION, IN/OUT/IN OUT parameters, RETURN.

topics.label: Packages
topics.description: Package spec and body for encapsulation. Group related procedures and types.

topics.label: Exception Handling
topics.description: EXCEPTION WHEN, RAISE, user-defined exceptions, SQLCODE/SQLERRM.

topics.label: Triggers
topics.description: BEFORE/AFTER triggers on INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE. :NEW and :OLD pseudo-records.

topics.label: Collections
topics.description: Nested tables, VARRAYs, and associative arrays (INDEX BY tables).

topics.label: Dynamic SQL
topics.description: EXECUTE IMMEDIATE and DBMS_SQL for runtime SQL construction.
